scripts.dev:ssr: npm run build:ssr && npm run serve:ssr
scripts.build:production: ng build --configuration production --output-hashing=all && ng run portal-startcompanies:server:production
scripts.build:production:pwa: NODE_ENV=production npm run validate:images && npm run optimize:images && ng build --configuration production --output-hashing=all && ng run portal-startcompanies:server:production
scripts.build:staging: ng build --configuration staging --output-hashing=all && ng run portal-startcompanies:server:staging
scripts.build:staging:pwa: NODE_ENV=production npm run validate:images && npm run optimize:images && ng build --configuration staging --output-hashing=all && ng run portal-startcompanies:server:staging
scripts.docker:build: npm run build:production:pwa && docker build -t portal-startcompanies .
scripts.docker:build:staging: npm run build:staging:pwa && docker build --build-arg BUILD_CONFIGURATION=staging --build-arg NODE_ENV=production -t portal-startcompanies:staging .
